# /split

> Emit `handoff.v1` per target agent when the F&O spec touches integration / d365-ce / reporting work products.

## Usage

```
/split [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--targets <comma-separated>]
```

## Common triggers

- Spec mentions an Azure-side endpoint or external service → `integration` (covers Service Bus, Functions, ADF outside of F&O DMF)
- Spec mentions a Power BI report on F&O data via BYOD / Synapse Link → `reporting`
- Spec mentions a virtual-entity or CE-mirror flow → `d365-ce`

## Execution flow

1. Scan spec.md keywords + §10 traceability matrix for cross-agent surface area.
2. For each target agent, build a `handoff.v1` envelope with `sourceAgent: d365-fo`, `targetArtifact: spec-seed`, payload = relevant spec excerpt + cross-references.
3. Validate against [schemas/handoff.v1.json](../../schemas/handoff.v1.json).
4. Write `projects/{p}/_handoffs/d365-fo-to-{target}-{feature}.handoff.json`.
5. Mark spec §10 with `<!-- split-emitted: {target} -->` markers.
6. `currentStates` += `SPEC_SPLIT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/_handoffs/d365-fo-to-{target}-{feature}.handoff.json`

- [design/09-orchestration-patterns.md](../../../design/09-orchestration-patterns.md)
